title: MemGuard KV Cache Protocol (MKCP) payload — v1.0.0
description: Schema for a single MKCP telemetry record emitted by an inference engine sidecar.

mkcp_version.description: MKCP spec version used by this emitter (semver, e.g. '1.0.0').

ts.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of the measurement. Payloads older than 5 minutes are rejected by the ingest endpoint.

source_id.description: Informational identifier for the emitting process or pod (e.g. 'pod/vllm-prod-abc123', 'host/gpu-node-07').

runtime.description: Execution environment detected by the emitter.

model_name.description: HuggingFace model identifier or custom name for the model being served.

metrics.description: The eight canonical MKCP metric values for this poll cycle. Unknown fields are ignored by v1 consumers.

kvcache.utilization.description: Fraction of KV cache blocks currently allocated. Range: [0.0, 1.0].

kvcache.allocation_velocity_mbps.description: Rate of KV cache growth over the last poll interval, in MB/s. Zero means stable or shrinking.

kvcache.eviction_rate.description: Rate of scheduler block evictions per second. Non-zero at moderate utilisation indicates memory pressure.

kvcache.fragmentation_ratio.description: Fraction of KV cache blocks that are allocated but not part of a contiguous free region. Range: [0.0, 1.0].

memory.pressure_level.description: OS-level cgroup memory pressure in MB above the high-watermark. Zero if eBPF probes are not active.

memory.oom_risk_score.description: GBT model probability of OOM in the next 30-120 seconds, as returned by POST /v1/predict. Range: [0.0, 1.0]. Zero if memguard-cloud is not configured.

memory.near_miss_count.description: Cumulative GPU allocations that succeeded with less than the headroom threshold (default: 512 MB) remaining. Requires memguard-allocator. Zero without the custom allocator.

scheduler.preemption_rate.description: Scheduler request preemptions per second. Distinct from kvcache.eviction_rate — one preemption may cause multiple block evictions.

oneOf.description: No threshold-crossing event in this poll cycle.
A discrete state-transition event that occurred during this poll cycle.

triggered_by.description: The MKCP metric name whose threshold crossing triggered this event.

value.description: The metric value at the moment of threshold crossing.

threshold.description: The configured threshold that was crossed.

batch_payload.description: Batch wrapper for up to 100 MKCP records in a single POST.

batch.description: Array of MKCP records. Maximum 100 per request.
